productDisplayName: Nike Women Sweet Classic High Black Casual Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic High shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather upper with perforated side panels for superior breathability and protection from bad odour and sweat Lace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statement Embroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touchHigh ankle for better support to the lower legMidsoleEVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioningOutsoleRubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability Leaf patterened herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the courtWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
